JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON AUG-30-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

JUDGE: NORRIS GOODWIN, CLERK: E.CLAVERIA (NO REPORTER) UNLAWFUL DETAINER 9:40AM: CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PRESENT: PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL ARNOLD EVJE II; DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. EXHIBITS INTRODUCED BY PLAINTIFF: PLAINTIFF CALLED BRUCE HALMIG, PROPERTY MANAGER, S/E.. 1. EXH. 2 (3-DAY NOTICE), FOR ID AND ADMITTED TO EVID. 2. EXH. 2 (LEASE CONTRACT),FOR ID AND ADMITTED TO EVID. JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF FOR: 1. $1022.78 FOR PAST DUE RENT AND $511.20 FOR DAMAGES (TOTAL:1533.98); 425.00 FOR ATTORNEY'S FEE; COST PER COST BILL. 2. PLAINTIFF TO HAVE POSSESSION AND RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 1495, #301 GOLDEN GATE AVE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. PLAINTIFF TP PREPARE JUSGMENT. EXHIBITS WITHDRAWN BY PLAINTIFF.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BELIZAIRE, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1495 GOLDEN GATE AVE, #301, SF, CA $1,533.98 RENT, $425.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,958.98, LEASE FORFEITED, COST PER COST BILL.
